title: canarium baileyanum
intro: Canarium baileyanum, also known as the Beccari's canarium or Canarium tree, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Burseraceae. This plant is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Canarium baileyanum include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments.
